title: Rajasthan RSSB Senior and Basic Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026 - 3951 Posts | Apply Online 25 May to 23 June
department: Secondary Education Department & Sanskrit Education Department, Government of Rajasthan
post_name: Senior Computer Instructor & Basic Computer Instructor
job_location: All Districts of Rajasthan (Non-Scheduled & Scheduled Areas)
short_info: RSSB Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) recruitment notification 2026 for 3951 Computer Instructor vacancies including 322 Senior Computer Instructor (Pay Level-10) and 3629 Basic Computer Instructor (Pay Level-8) posts under the Secondary Education Department and Sanskrit Education Department, Government of Rajasthan. The online application process starts on 25th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 23rd June 2026 (11:59 PM) via SSO Recruitment Portal. Find RSSB Computer Instructor vacancies on the official website rssb.rajasthan.gov.in. You can a

important_dates.result_date: To be notified on official website

application_fee.details: The One Time Registration (OTR) fee is applicable for registration on the SSO Portal. This is a one-time fee valid for all future RSSB and RSLDC recruitments. Candidates who have already paid OTR fee need not pay again. Candidates from outside Rajasthan are treated as General category regardless of caste and must pay Rs. 600. | Payment Mode: e-Mitra / CSC / Net Banking / ATM Debit Card / Credit Card | Note: The OTR fee is non-refundable but is a one-time registration valid for all future RSSB and RSLDC recruitments.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2027. Age relaxation is available for women, reserved categories, Ex-Servicemen, and PwBD candidates as per Government of Rajasthan norms. For Secondary Education Department posts only, an additional 3 years' relaxation is applicable as no recruitment was held after 2022 (not applicable to Sanskrit Education posts). All age relaxations are non-cumulative. | Important Note: For Secondary Education Department posts only, an additional 3 years' relaxation is applicable as no recruitment was held after 2022. This does not apply to Sanskrit Education posts.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification, working knowledge of Hindi in Devanagari script, and knowledge of Rajasthani culture. Age is calculated as on 01-01-2027. | Post-Wise Educational Qualification:

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be appointed with pay scale as per 7th Pay Commission adopted by Government of Rajasthan. Probation period is 2 years. During probation, fixed remuneration is paid (no regular pay scale, DA, HRA, or TA). After satisfactory completion of probation and confirmation, full pay scale with DA, HRA, TA, NPS, GPF, Gratuity, LTC, and Medical Benefits become applicable. | Probation Period & Benefits: | Probation Period: 2 years During Probation: Fixed remuneration (no regular pay scale, DA, HRA, or TA) After Confirmation: Full pay scale + DA + HRA + TA + NPS + GPF + Gratuity + LTC + Medical Benefits

selection_process: Stage 1 - CBT Merit-based (200 marks) Two papers of 100 marks each. Negative marking of 1/3 per wrong answer. Qualifying: 40% (General), 35% (SC/ST). Normalization applied if conducted in multiple shifts.
Stage 2 - Document Verification Qualifying Candidates shortlisted on merit are called to verify original certificates and documents.
Stage 3 - Medical Examination Qualifying Medical fitness certificate from Chief Medical & Health Officer of the district or Medical Jurist.
The selection process for RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026 consists of three stages: Computer Based Test (CBT)
and Medical Examination. Final selection is based on merit in CBT.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the Rajasthan SSO Portal (sso.rajasthan.gov.in). No offline applications are accepted under any circumstances. The online portal is active from 25-05-2026 to 23-06-2026 (11:59 PM).
Step 1: Visit SSO Portal - Go to sso.rajasthan.gov.in and log in with your SSO ID
Step 2: Complete OTR (if not registered) - Complete One Time Registration (OTR) - fill category, disability status, and domicile details correctly

Step 3: Pay OTR Fee - Pay the OTR registration fee (Rs. 600 for General/Creamy OBC/MBC, Rs. 400 for Non-Creamy OBC/MBC/EWS/SC/ST/PwBD) through e-Mitra, CSC, Net Banking, ATM Debit Card, or Credit Card
Step 4: Access Recruitment Portal - After OTR, log in to SSO and go to Citizen Apps (G2C) → Recruitment Portal
Step 5: Click Apply Now - Click Apply Now for Advertisement No. 07/2026
Step 6: Fill Application Form - Fill in personal details, educational qualifications, and department preference (Secondary/Sanskrit Education) with priority order
Step 7: Upload Documents - Upload required documents: qualification certificates, category certificate, domicile, disability certificate (if applicable), photo, signature, thumb impression
Step 8: Verify & Submit - Verify all entries carefully before clicking Final Submit
Step 9: Save Application - Download and save the application with the generated Application ID for future reference
important_instructions: Applications are online only - no offline applications accepted under any circumstances Application period: 25-05-2026 to 23-06-2026 (11:59 PM) Age calculated as on 01-01-2027: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 40 years (relaxation as per category) Complete OTR (One Time Registration) on SSO Portal well before last date to avoid transaction pendency issues Correction window: 3 days after application closure (Fee: Rs. 300) Second correction window: 7 days after examination Name, father's name, date of birth, photo, signature, and thumb impression cannot be changed even in correction window CBT Exam: Senior - 22-08-2026, Basic - 23-08-2026 Exam Pattern: 200 marks (Paper I: 100 + Paper II: 100), 4 hours total duration Negative Marking: 1/3 mark per wrong answer Qualifying Marks: 40% for General, 35% for SC/ST OBC certificate must be based on father's name, residence, and income - husband-based OBC certificates not valid EWS income & asset certificate valid for 1 year from issue date (extendable up to 3 years with affidavit) Caste certificates issued by non-competent authorities will be rejected at document verification stage For Secondary Education posts: additional 3 years age relaxation (not for Sanskrit Education) Candidates from outside Rajasthan treated as General category - must pay Rs. 600 OTR fee Probation period: 2 years (fixed remuneration during probation) Use of unfair means will lead to debarment and criminal proceedings under Rajasthan Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2022 False information will lead to disqualification and legal action under IPC Section 217 No TA/DA payable for attending CBT exam or document verification Candidates failing to appear in two or more RSSB exams in a financial year may have OTR blocked

faq.question: Q1. What is the total vacancy in RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 3951 posts - 322 Senior Computer Instructor and 3629 Basic Computer Instructor - across Secondary Education and Sanskrit Education Departments in both Non-Scheduled and Scheduled areas of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 23 June 2026 up to 11:59 PM. Candidates must apply through the SSO Recruitment Portal only, as no offline applications are accepted. A correction window of 3 days will also be available after the deadline with a fee of ₹300.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 to 40 years of age as on 01 January 2027 for General male applicants. Age relaxation is provided for reserved categories including SC, ST, OBC, EWS, females, PwBD, and ex-servicemen as per Rajasthan government rules. Additional relaxation of 3 years is applicable for Secondary Education posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the qualifications required for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: For Senior Computer Instructor, candidates need a postgraduate degree such as ME, M.Tech, MCA, or M.Sc. in Computer Science/IT or related fields. For Basic Computer Instructor, candidates must have a graduation degree with computer qualifications like BCA, B.Tech, B.Sc. (CS/IT), or PGDCA/'A' Level. Knowledge of Hindi in Devanagari script and Rajasthani culture is mandatory for both posts.

faq.question: Q5. Is there negative marking in RSSB Computer Instructor Exam 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, there is a negative marking of 1/3 mark for each incorrect answer in the exam. Each question has five options (A to E), and candidates must mark option E if they choose to skip a question. Leaving more than 10% questions unanswered without marking any option will lead to additional penalties.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for RSSB Computer Instructor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹600 for General and Creamy Layer OBC/MBC candidates. For Non-Creamy Layer OBC/MBC, EWS, SC, ST, and PwBD candidates of Rajasthan, the fee is ₹400. Candidates from other states are treated as General category and must pay ₹600.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary of RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: Senior Computer Instructors are paid under Pay Level-10 with a salary range of ₹56,100 to ₹1,77,500. Basic Computer Instructors fall under Pay Level-8 with a salary range of ₹47,600 to ₹1,51,100. During the probation period of 2 years, a fixed remuneration is provided, after which full salary and allowances are applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from other states apply for RSSB Computer Instructor 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from outside Rajasthan can apply for this recruitment. However, they will be considered under the General category regardless of their caste. They are not eligible for reservation benefits and must pay the full application fee.

faq.question: Q9. Can I edit my RSSB Computer Instructor application form after submission?
faq.answer: Yes, RSSB provides a correction window for 3 days after the application deadline with a fee of ₹300. Additionally, a second correction window of 7 days is available after the exam. However, critical details like name, date of birth, photo, and signature cannot be modified.

faq.question: Q10. When will the RSSB Computer Instructor Admit Card 2026 be released?
faq.answer: The admit card release date has not been officially announced yet by RSSB. It will be made available on the official website rssb.rajasthan.gov.in before the examination. Candidates are advised to regularly check the website for the latest updates and notifications.
